case_title: IRMA ENCINAS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-02-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IRMA ENCINAS IS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT PRESENT. TRICIA PEARCE-WILLIAMS, CLAIMS ADJUSTER A REPRESENTATIVE FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IN ANOTHER CASE RESQUESTED THE CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-26-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/7/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE LISTED SERVED AUG-15-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENCINAS, IRMA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-26-2017 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ENCINAS, IRMA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL: THE REQUEST TO POTPONE IS APPROVED.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/07/2021 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
